# @fluenti/vite-plugin

> Vite plugin for Fluenti — compile-time transforms for Vue, React, and Solid, plus stable locale chunk splitting.

Docs: https://fluenti.dev  
GitHub: https://github.com/usefluenti/fluenti/tree/main/packages/vite-plugin

## Install

```bash
pnpm add -D @fluenti/vite-plugin
```

## Setup

```ts
// vite.config.ts
import fluenti from '@fluenti/vite-plugin'

export default {
  plugins: [
    fluenti({
      framework: 'vue',      // 'vue' | 'react' | 'solid' | 'auto'
      splitting: 'dynamic',  // 'dynamic' | 'static' | false
    }),
  ],
}
```

## Public Options

- `framework`: `'vue' | 'react' | 'solid' | 'auto'` (default: `'auto'`)
- `catalogDir`: path to compiled message catalogs (default: `'src/locales/compiled'`)
- `sourceLocale`: source locale (default: `'en'`)
- `locales`: available locales (default: `[sourceLocale]`)
- `splitting`: `'dynamic' | 'static' | false` (default: `false`)
- `defaultBuildLocale`: locale used for `'static'` builds (default: `sourceLocale`)

## What It Transforms

- direct-import `t` from `@fluenti/vue`, `@fluenti/react`, or `@fluenti/solid`
- runtime `t` bindings from `useI18n()`
- Vue `v-t`
- `<Trans>`, `<Plural>`, and `<Select>`

The plugin is strict and AST-based. It does not rely on regex fallback, magic globals, or public runtime proxies.

## Splitting Model

- `'dynamic'`: default locale stays in the initial bundle; other locales load on demand
- `'static'`: inline one locale at build time, ideal for SSR / SSG single-locale builds
- `false`: no locale chunk splitting

`per-route` remains internal and is not part of the stable public contract.

## Important Boundary

The plugin uses `virtual:fluenti/*` modules internally to connect transformed code to compiled catalogs. Those virtual modules are implementation details, not the main app-facing API. Application code should stay on framework APIs such as `setLocale()`, `preloadLocale()`, `loadMessages()`, and `chunkLoader`.

## Exports

- `default`: `fluentiPlugin(options?): Plugin[]`
- `FluentiPluginOptions`: public plugin options type
